findings.description: Header official names and titles are duplicated in the HTML. They appear once alongside the logo/seal image and again as separate text elements below, creating a reading-order disruption.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows ROY COOPER Governor, ELIZABETH S. BISER Secretary, KATHY B. RAWLS Director once in the letterhead. HTML renders them twice: once next to the logo and again as standalone text blocks below the inline footer.

findings.description: PDF page footer content is inserted inline in the HTML content flow between the letterhead area and the proclamation body, disrupting reading order.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 footer ('State of North Carolina | Division of Marine Fisheries, 3441 Arendell Street…') appears inline in the HTML between the header/logo section and the start of the proclamation text, rather than being removed or consolidated.

findings.description: PDF page footer content inserted inline between page-equivalent sections in the HTML, disrupting reading flow between Gear Restrictions and General Information.
findings.evidence: The footer text 'State of North Carolina | Division of Marine Fisheries…' from the PDF page 2/3 boundary appears inline in the HTML between the end of Section III (Gear Restrictions) and the start of Section IV (General Information).

findings.description: A full-page-width image (612pt) is inserted mid-content between Section III (Gear Restrictions) and Section IV (General Information), corresponding to a PDF page break. This is a page-boundary artifact (likely a captured page footer/header graphic) that disrupts the reading flow of the HTML body.
findings.evidence:
HTML contains: placed between the closing of Section III and the

for Section IV. No corresponding substantive image exists at this location in the PDF; this is a page break artifact.

findings.description: The first image (NC Division of Marine Fisheries seal/logo) and the mid-content page-break artifact image both have empty alt="" attributes. The state agency seal is a substantive organizational image and warrants descriptive alt text.
findings.evidence: HTML: — PDF shows the NC Division of Marine Fisheries bicentennial seal. Alt text should describe the seal, e.g., 'North Carolina Division of Marine Fisheries seal'.
